tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement - Phase 2 added

payload.description: Modification to add Phase 2 of the Park Avenue Viaduct replacement, from East 127th Street to midblock between East 131st and East 132nd Streets, to the existing Phase 1 design-build contract with Halmar International

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 - Field Office Lease

payload.description: Field office lease at 159 East 125th Street, New York, NY for the Second Avenue Subway Phase II project. 17,647 SF on third floor. Letter agreement for design work reimbursement up to $225,000.
MTA Board Meeting at 2 Broadway 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY

payload.description: Capital Projects Public Hearing for Federal Fiscal Year 2024 federal grant proposals. Hybrid format at 2 Broadway, New York, NY and virtual via Zoom.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: Board approved the Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP) Toll Rate Schedule (CBD Charge Schedule), adopting the proposed toll rate structure for the central business district tolling program of the Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority.

Congestion Pricing (formally known as the Central Business District Tolling Program) is planned to launch in June 2024. By charging vehicles a toll to enter the Congestion Relief Zone, defined as local streets and avenues in Manhattan at or below 60th Street.
Total proposed expenditure for 4 ratification actions in April 2024 Procurement Agenda

Overall schedule savings from performing Phase 1 and Phase 2 simultaneously rather than as separate contracts

payload.raw_value_text: reducing the need for weekend service outages by 60% (eliminating approximately 24 weekend outages)
payload.description: Reduction in weekend service outages from performing both phases simultaneously

payload.claim_text: Overall crime was down more than 15% in March, and the 30% reduction in crime levels that occurred since January has resulted in year-to-date 2024 crime statistically being barely above last year.
payload.subject: MTA subway crime

payload.description: Hayden AI contract for up to 1,023 Automated Bus Lane Enforcement systems
Seon contract for up to 1,000 Automated Bus Lane Enforcement systems

payload.claim_text: MTA proposing a temporary fare pilot promotion for railroad customers for a discount up to 10% on monthly passes within the city zones. This fare pilot promotion will start with the sale of monthly passes for July 2024. The duration would be at least 12 months and may continue until the next permanent fare change, provided continued funding from the Outer Borough Transportation Account (OBTA).
payload.subject: LIRR and MNR city zone monthly passes

payload.claim_text: Following legislative approval to monitor and ticket vehicles obstructing bus stops as well double-parked vehicles, DOB has updated the scope of work, changed the name of this project to Automated Camera Enforcement ('ACE'), and requested that Procurement begin negotiations with both vendors to add the enforcement of bus stop and double-parked vehicle laws to these contracts.
